narrative:
Olentangy Local Sd (Delaware) school district has 77,788 registered voters, with 54.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.1%, a clear Republican lean of 11.1 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +0.0% D−R vs -23.5% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
